nodes.label: exp/colorpallet.html
nodes.summary: Experimental static HTML canvas demoing three chatbot UI color palettes (Calm & Focused, Midnight Focus, Warm & Playful) with simulated chat bubbles and hex codes.

edges.note: Color palette experiment informed the glassmorphism UI color scheme decisions

hyperedges.relation: Experimental HTML canvas files exploring UI concepts (color palettes), cellular automata (Game of Life), and algorithm visualization (Bubble Sort) separate from the main app.
